title: From Molecular Visualization to Spatial Landscapes: Engineering the Next Generation of In Situ Hybridization.
snippet: In situ hybridization (ISH) has undergone a rapid evolution from a low-throughput histological staining technique to a diverse family of modern methods for sensitive, specific and multiplexed molecular detection in intact cells and tissues, and to a cornerstone technology for image-based spatial transcriptomics. This transformation has been driven by advanc...
